consolidate-agent-memories.prompt:
Run memory consolidation. Working directory is Q:/src. Scan all sub-project memory dirs under C:/Users/qitxu/.claude/projects/Q--src*/memory/, compare against root memory at C:/Users/qitxu/.claude/projects/Q--src/memory/, copy new/updated files with ext_ prefix, remove duplicates, update MEMORY.md index (keep under 200 lines), run permission audit, root hygiene, stale file cleanup, and report template audit (scan all agent .md files under C:/Users/qitxu/.claude/agents/ and job configs under Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/config/jobs/*.json to verify HTML reports have VO subtitle, dark theme, Segoe UI, and are self-contained). Generate the daily HTML report to Q:/src/local_skills/session_management/memory-report-YYYYMMDD.html. The report MUST include a standard VO subtitle immediately below the main title:

Agent: Checker | Job: consolidate-agent-memories | Start: | Complete:

. Open the report in Edge when done.
consolidate-agent-memories.description: Consolidates all sub-project memories into root, deduplicates, generates HTML report

TODO-sprint-progress.prompt:
Generate a sprint progress update now. You MUST save the report as a self-contained HTML file (inline CSS, no external dependencies) to Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/output/sprint-progress-YYYYMMDD.html (using today's date). Also save a copy to Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/output/sprint-progress-latest.html. Use the Segoe UI font, a blue header with sprint name/dates, summary cards for counts (completed/in-progress/not-started/blocked), a work items table, highlights, and risks sections. The report MUST include a standard VO subtitle immediately below the main title:

Agent: Checker | Job: TODO-sprint-progress | Start: | Complete:

. Open the report in Edge after saving.
TODO-sprint-progress.description: Queries ADO work items and meeting notes to generate sprint progress report

TODO-compare-runs.prompt: Compare all scrum-master reports and create GitHub issues for detected problems. Run: python Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/runner/Compare-Runs.py (without --dry-run flag to actually create issues). This will parse ADO autopilot HTML reports and bug autopilot investigations.json, compare across runs, generate a summary at Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/output/scrum-master/run-summaries/, and create GitHub issues in teams-microsoft/ado-autopilot and teams-microsoft/bug-autopilot repos. Issues that were already created (tracked in issue-state.json) will be skipped. Open the comparison summary in Edge after completion.
TODO-compare-runs.description: Compares run results across runs and files GitHub issues for detected problems

YTD-OOF-Summary.prompt:
Run the YTD-OOF-Summary job. Query both Teams channels (Absence and OOF/WFH/Late) via WorkIQ for all messages from Dec 1 of previous year through today. Filter for direct reports only, classify each absence as full-day OOF or BRB/partial, count only current-year working days, and generate the HTML report using the template. The report MUST include a standard VO subtitle immediately below the main title:

Agent: Checker | Job: YTD-OOF-Summary | Start: | Complete:

. Open in Edge when done.
YTD-OOF-Summary.description: Monthly YTD OOF summary for direct reports from Teams channels
